meaning: n.猎鸟时以引诱别的鸟(特别是野鸭)集于一地的真鸟或假鸟,圈套,诱骗vt.诱骗
examples: You will play decoy whilst I beg.
Marketing professors call it the decoy effect, which is certainly easier to remember.
The decoy effect works because of the way our brains assign value when making choices.
He could create a large number of decoy accounts and have different people pay different accounts.
San Francisco responded by announcing a route that turned out to be a decoy.
